/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/Bloodbound.dir/Bloodbound_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Bloodbound.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Bloodbound.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o Bloodbound  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
